programmes.show_description: Chewed Up, Spit Out, and Stepped On: It all kicks off between Hop Wei and Long Zii following an assassination attempt. Big Bill sets out to pay his debt. (S1, ep 6)

First Born: A mysterious family friend arrives to help transform Worf's reluctant son Alexander into a warrior.

programmes.show_description: New. The Falkirk Wheel: Stephen Mangan hosts the grand finale with just three artists who have made it through to the last round of the competition. (S11, ep 8)

The Storyteller: Jake Sisko and Nog fight over a young Bajoran girl. Also, An elderly Bajoran transfers his powers to O'Brien before dying, and without explaining how to use them.
The Devil You Know - Part II: SG-1 must escape from a prison built to simulate the fires of Hell. (S3, ep 13)
Drive: Peter and Kay enter a race symbolising the signing of a momentous peace treaty, and B'Elanna fears her relationship with Tom isn't meant to be. (S7, ep 3)
Bloodlines: A Ferengi plans to avenge the death of his son by killing Picard's son.
Concrete Menagerie: Stephen reluctantly helps Lester capture a Silurian scorpion. The conspiracy unravels and people working on the project die - or do they? Season finale. (S2, ep 7)
Carentan: An uncomfortable truth resonates for the Easy Company as they battle on against the Germans, their injuries and their fears. Contains flashing images. (3 of 10)
Replacements: A rest in England prepares Easy Co and their replacements for a mission. An attack serves as a sobering initiation for the new recruits. Contains flashing images. (4 of 10)
El Cuegle: As Nick and Hank investigate the kidnapping of a baby boy, a young family are terrorised by a frightening new Wesen. (S6, ep 4)
